params.name: Zigarde Cube
params.description: Composed of countless tiny polyhedra,This complex geometric substance seems to constantly change position and angle, making the whole appear as if it is perpetually rotating and flowing. When light shines on the Gigalith Polyhedron, it refracts a dazzling array of genetic imprints, like stars shining in the night sky. Warning: Each time a species is consumed by it, the species' genes become a new face.
